subcodes.first_line: O Samandar! The Lord of Destiny calleth thee from this Most Great Horizon, that the breaths of revelation may draw thee time and again [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا سمندر ینادیک مالک القدر من هذا المنظر الاکبر لتجذبک نفحات الوحی مره بعد
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort
